evals.prompt: I built a SaaS tool and want to get listed on LaunchingNext for the SEO backlink. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Submission checklist with headline, description, tags guidance, free vs expedited decision, and realistic traffic expectations

assertions.name: submission_checklist
assertions.description: Covers submission preparation: headline (5-8 words), description (max 2,500 chars), tags, stage classification

assertions.name: free_vs_expedited
assertions.description: Explains free queue (weeks/months) vs $99 expedited (1-business-day review) tradeoff

assertions.name: backlink_value
assertions.description: Mentions DR51 do-follow backlink as the primary value of a LaunchingNext listing

assertions.name: realistic_expectations
assertions.description: Sets realistic traffic expectations given ~727 monthly visitors across the whole site

evals.prompt: Is the LaunchingNext Seed Boost promoted ad worth $500/month for my startup?
evals.expected_output: ROI analysis of Seed Boost with cost per visit calculation, comparison framework, and recommendation

assertions.name: cost_breakdown
assertions.description: Breaks down Seed Boost numbers: 8K impressions, 125-350 visits, ~$2.11 per visit average

assertions.name: roi_framework
assertions.description: Provides a framework to calculate ROI based on conversion rate and customer LTV

assertions.name: delivery_guarantee
assertions.description: Mentions the 30-day delivery guarantee (free extension if impression floor isn't met)

assertions.name: recommendation
assertions.description: Provides a clear recommendation, such as trying one month to measure real conversion data

evals.prompt: I submitted my startup to LaunchingNext 3 weeks ago and haven't heard anything. What's going on?
evals.expected_output: Explains the long free queue, offers expedited upgrade option, and suggests productive use of wait time

assertions.name: queue_explanation
assertions.description: Explains that free submissions have a long queue (weeks to months) due to editorial review volume

assertions.name: expedited_option
assertions.description: Suggests the $99 expedited review as an option for faster consideration

assertions.name: no_guarantee
assertions.description: Notes that even expedited review doesn't guarantee publication — still editorial discretion

assertions.name: productive_wait
assertions.description: Suggests using wait time productively (polish landing page, prepare other directory submissions)
